payload.claim_text: Overtime expenses were unfavorable by $99 million (35%), mainly due to absentee coverage requirements at NYCT

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.event_name: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Central Business District Tolling Program loan closing
payload.description: TBTA successfully closed a $500 million Central Business District Tolling Program loan, proceeds will fund congestion pricing-related transit and commuter projects set forth in the 2020-2024 capital program. The loan is tax-exempt and matures on May 1, 2026.
